strings.title: MAT107 · Umahiri
strings.topics_blurb: Mastery = 10 correct with no hints per topic. Wrong answers never lower mastery. Hinted corrects (or skip after a hint) lower the counter by 1 — including after you’ve mastered a topic. Hints never reveal the answer — only how to work. Grade credit if correct: Hint 1 −25%, Hint 2 −50%, Hint 3 −75%. After a miss you can still enter the right answer once for 5% credit (not mastery).
strings.mastery_blurb: Need 10 unaided corrects to master a topic. Wrong answers never change mastery. Hinted corrects (or skip after a hint) drop the counter by 1. 5% retries never add mastery.
strings.reset_confirm: Reset all progress stored in this browser?
strings.load_fail: Failed to load quiz scripts. Open index.html from the project folder (keep the js/, css/, and lang/ folders beside it).
strings.pi_note: Tumia π = 3.14. Mzunguko hadi karibu mia.
strings.calc_generic:
How to enter it (you finish and round):
TI-36X Pro / Casio: type the setup left → right using × ÷ + − and parentheses.
Squares: press x² after the number. Square roots: TI press 2nd x² ; Casio press √.
Decimals: TI press ◄► ; Casio press S⇔D. Round to the place asked—usually hundredths. The hint never shows the final answer.
strings.calc_tip_default: Do not use the π key when a problem says π = 3.14 — type 3.14. Convert exact/fraction displays with ◄► (TI-36X Pro) or S⇔D (Casio), then round yourself to the place asked (usually hundredths). Hints never show the final answer.
strings.card.sq_p.front: Mzunguko wa mraba na upande s
strings.card.sq_a.front: Eneo la mraba na upande s
strings.card.rect_p.front: Mzunguko wa mstatili wenye urefu wa L na upana W
strings.card.rect_p.hint: Urefu mbili pamoja na upana mbili.
strings.card.rect_a.front: Eneo la mstatili lenye urefu wa L na upana W
strings.card.tri_p.front: Mzunguko wa pembetatu yenye pande a, b, na c
strings.card.tri_a.front: Eneo la pembetatu yenye msingi b na urefu h
strings.card.tri_a.hint: Nusu ya urefu wa nyakati za msingi.
strings.card.circ_c.front: Mzunguko wa duara na radius r
strings.card.circ_c.hint: Pia C = πd yenye kipenyo d.
strings.card.circ_a.front: Eneo la duara na radius r
strings.card.cube.front: Kiasi cha mchemraba na upande s
strings.card.sphere.front: Kiasi cha tufe kilicho na radius r
strings.card.cyl.front: Kiasi cha silinda yenye radius r na urefu h
strings.card.cyl.hint: Eneo la urefu wa mduara wa msingi.
strings.card.pyth.front: Nadharia ya Pythagorean (miguu a, b; hypotenuse c)
strings.card.pyth.hint: Jumla ya miraba ya miguu ni sawa na mraba wa hypotenuse.
strings.flash.recognize:
Kadi ya fomula — ni ipi sahihi kwa:
{front}?
strings.flash.match_hint: Linganisha jina la umbo na fomula yake. Mchoro sahihi huanza kama: {left} = ...
strings.q.feet_in_yard: Kuna futi ngapi katika yadi moja? (Inatumika wakati wa kupima uwanja wa mpira wa wavu wa ukumbi wa kitamaduni.)
strings.q.sqft_sqyd: Je, kuna futi ngapi za mraba katika yadi moja ya mraba? (Mipango ya sakafu ya Muungano wa Usaidizi wa Kina Mama inahitaji maelezo madogomadogo haya.)
strings.q.cuft_cuyd: Je! ni futi ngapi za ujazo kwenye yadi moja ya ujazo? (Hesabu ya ngano ya hifadhi ya chakula, mtu yeyote?)
strings.h.cuft_cuyd: Yadi ya ujazo ni 3 ft 3 × 3 ft
strings.c.dim_a: Mzunguko ni 1D, eneo ni 2D, na sauti ni 3D
strings.c.dim_b: Mzunguko ni 2D, eneo ni 1D, na ujazo ni 3D
strings.c.dim_c: Mzunguko ni 1D, eneo ni 3D, na sauti ni 2D
strings.c.dim_d: Mzunguko, eneo, na ujazo vyote ni 2D
strings.q.form_sq_p: Je, ni fomula gani ya mzunguko wa mraba yenye urefu wa upande s?
strings.q.form_sq_a: Je! ni fomula gani ya eneo la mraba lenye urefu wa upande s?
strings.q.form_rect_p: Je, ni fomula gani ya mzunguko wa mstatili wenye urefu L na upana W?
strings.q.form_rect_a: Je! ni fomula gani ya eneo la mstatili wenye urefu wa L na upana W?
strings.q.form_tri_a: Je! ni fomula gani ya eneo la pembetatu yenye msingi b na urefu h?
strings.q.form_circ_c: Je, ni fomula gani ya mduara wa duara yenye radius r?
strings.q.form_circ_a: Je! ni fomula gani ya eneo la duara lenye radius r?
strings.q.form_cyl: Je, ni formula gani ya kiasi cha silinda yenye radius r na urefu h?
strings.q.form_cube: Je! ni fomula gani ya ujazo wa mchemraba na upande wa s?
strings.q.form_sphere: Je! ni fomula gani ya ujazo wa duara yenye radius r?
strings.q.form_pyth: Je, ni mlinganyo upi wa Nadharia ya Pythagorean ya pembetatu ya kulia yenye miguu a, b na hypotenuse c?
strings.q.rect_p: Ukumbi wa kitamaduni unahitaji mkanda wa mchoraji kuzunguka korti ya mstatili ambayo inapima {L} ft kwa {W} ft (ndiyo, mahakama ile ile ambapo wadau bado wanafikiri kwamba wako kwenye NBA). Mzunguko wake wa miguu ni nini?
strings.q.rect_a: Dada Jensen anapima linoleum kwa darasa la Msingi la mstatili {L} ft kwa {W} ft. (Alinong'ona, “Na ikawa… tunahitaji eneo zaidi.”) Je, eneo la sakafu katika futi za mraba ni nini?
strings.h.rect_p: P = 2L + 2W (au 2(L+W)). Kwenye TI-36X Pro / Casio ingiza usemi, kisha =.
strings.h.rect_a: A = L × W. Kwenye TI-36X Pro / Casio ingiza urefu × upana, kisha =.
strings.q.tri_area: Ramani ya safari ya waanzilishi wa vijana inaonyesha uwanda wa pembetatu wenye vizio vya {b} na urefu wa vizio {h}—mahali pekee tambarare ambayo si dhoruba ya vumbi. Eneo lake ni lipi? Zungusha hadi mia iliyo karibu ikiwa inahitajika.
strings.h.tri_area: A = ½ bh. Weka nusu × msingi × urefu kwenye kikokotoo chako.
strings.q.circ_c: Wadi ina ukungu wa Jell-O wa mviringo wenye radius {r} inchi (klassiki katika kila potluck). Mzunguko wake ni upi? {pi_note}
strings.q.circ_a: Uso wa saa ya kikao cha sakramenti wenye umbo la mviringo una radius {r}. Eneo lake ni lipi? {pi_note}
strings.h.circ_c: C = 2πr. Andika 3.14 kwa π (usitumie kitufe cha π—majibu yamewekewa 3.14).
strings.h.circ_a: A = πr². Andika 3.14 kwa π. Tumia x² kwa mraba.
strings.q.lshape_a: Urekebishaji wa ofisi ya askofu uliacha mpango wa sakafu wenye umbo la L unaotoshana katika mstatili {W} × {H}, ukiwa na mstatili {cutW} × {cutH} uliokatwa kutoka kona moja kwa kabati la "vidakuzi vya dharura" ambavyo ni vigumu sana. Eneo la umbo la L ni nini?
strings.q.lshape_p: Ghala la kuhifadhia mkokoteni wa Nefi (kidhahania) ni umbo la L linalofaa katika {W} × {H} mstatili na alama ya kona ya {cutW} × {cutH} kuondolewa—kwa sababu hata manabii wanahitaji mipango ya ajabu ya sakafu. Je, eneo la nje la umbo la L ni nini?
strings.h.lshape_a: Eneo la L = eneo la mstatili mkubwa - eneo la kipande kilichokatwa
strings.h.lshape_p: Kutembea ukingo wa nje: kata huongeza na kuondoa kingo zinazoghairi - P = 2(W+H)
strings.q.fence_need: Ndugu Larsen anataka kuwekea uzio bustani ya jamii ya kata— futi {ft1} futi {in1} inchi kwa {ft2} futi {in2} inchi—ili zukini wakome “kwenda misheni” kwenye ua wa Dada Clark. Unahitaji futi ngapi za uzio kuizunguka? Mzunguko hadi karibu mia.
strings.q.fence_roll: Amoni anazungushia uzio shamba la bustani {ft1}' {in1}" na {ft2}' {in2}" (ndogo kuliko mashamba ya Mfalme Lamoni, kwa shukrani). Uzio huja kwa roli za futi 50 au futi 100 kwenye njia ya vifaa vya Deseret Industries. Unahitaji roll gani?
strings.h.fence: Badilisha inchi kwa miguu, kisha P = 2(L+W). Weka inchi 12 kwenye kikokotoo.
strings.h.fence_roll: Badilisha vipimo kuwa futi, tafuta mzunguko P = 2(L+W), kisha uchague safu ndogo zaidi ambayo ni angalau P.
strings.q.soup: Relief Society inaweka kwenye kopo silinda ya viazi za mazishi. Kipenyo cha msingi ni {d} inchi na urefu ni {h} inchi. Kiasi ni kipi? {pi_note}
strings.h.soup: V = πr²h, na r = kipenyo/2. Andika 3.14 kwa π (sio kitufe cha π).
strings.q.drive_slope: Njia ya kuelekea katikati ya vigingi huinuka {rise} ft juu ya umbali mlalo wa {run} ft—mwinuko zaidi kuliko mkondo wa kujifunza wa mmisionari mpya. Je, ni mteremko gani? Andika kama kupanda kwa uwiano kilichorahisishwa:kukimbia au kama sehemu ya kupanda/kukimbia.
strings.q.drive_len: Familia ya Lehi, kama ingekuwa na lami, inaweza kuwa imetumia barabara inayoinuka {rise} ft juu ya umbali mlalo wa {run} ft. Je, ni urefu gani wa mshazari wa barabara hiyo ya kuelekea garini? Mzunguko hadi karibu mia. (Kidokezo kutoka kwa Alma: kuwa na imani—na tumia √(a² + b²).)
strings.h.drive_slope: mteremko = kupanda / kukimbia (mabadiliko ya wima juu ya mabadiliko ya mlalo)
strings.h.drive_len: Tumia Nadharia ya Pythagorean: c = √(a² + b²). Mzizi wa mraba ni wa 2 x² kwenye TI-36X Pro; √ kwenye Casio.
strings.q.tv: Familia yako imefunga TV ya {diagonal}-inch ambayo ina upana wa inchi {width}—ni kamili kwa Mkutano Mkuu (na kwa kubishana kuhusu nani anakaa wapi). Je, ni urefu gani? Zungusha hadi sehemu ya kumi iliyo karibu. (Ukubwa wa runinga ndio ulalo, sio "ukubwa" wa kiroho wa mazungumzo.)
strings.h.tv: Ulalo ni hypotenuse: urefu = √(diagonal² − upana²). Zungusha hadi sehemu ya kumi iliyo karibu.
strings.q.gal_l: Una bakuli la {gallons} la galoni ya kuhifadhi chakula kwa ajili ya pikiniki ya wadi (aina ya waridi ambayo kila wakati inaonekana kama fluorescent). Je, itachukua chupa ngapi za lita-{bottleL} ili kuijaza? (Galoni 1 = lita 3.785). Mzunguko hadi karibu mia. "Na ikawa kwamba" mtu alinunua chupa za metric.
strings.h.gal_l: Badilisha galoni → lita, kisha ugawanye kwa ukubwa wa chupa.
strings.q.map_to_real: Ramani ya trek ina kipimo cha 1 inchi : {scaleFt} futi. Kituo cha pumziko kiko umbali wa {inches} inchi kwenye ramani. Ni futi ngapi kwenda huko?
strings.q.real_to_map: Ramani ya shughuli ina kipimo 1 inchi : {scaleFt} futi. Alama iko {feet} futi mbele. Ni inchi ngapi kwenye ramani? Kadiria kwa mia ya karibu ikihitajika.
strings.h.map_to_real: Zidisha inchi za ramani kwa kipimo (miguu kwa inchi).
strings.h.real_to_map: Gawanya umbali halisi kwa futi-kwa inchi.
strings.q.carpet_roll: Chumba cha Msingi ni {L} ft × {W} ft na kinahitaji zulia jipya—ikiwezekana kitu kinachoweza kustahimili maji ya zabibu na "Kichwa, Mabega, Magoti na Vidole vya miguu." Zulia huja katika roll {rollW} ft upana kwa ${cost} kwa kila mguu wa mstari (uliosakinishwa). Chaguo hili linagharimu kiasi gani? Mzunguko hadi senti ya karibu.
strings.q.carpet_yd: Darasa la upande tulivu la ukumbi wa kitamaduni ni {L} ft × {W} ft. Carpet inagharimu ${cost} kwa yadi ya mraba (imesakinishwa)—nafuu zaidi kuliko kujenga meli kama Nefi, ambayo bado ni ghali. Chaguo hili linagharimu kiasi gani? Mzunguko hadi senti ya karibu. (Futi 9 za mraba = yadi 1 mraba)
strings.q.carpet_cmp: Relief Society inalinganisha chaguo za zulia kwa chumba {L}'×{W}'. Chaguo A: roll yenye upana {rollW}' kwa ${costLin}/ft. Chaguo B: ${costYd}/sq yd. Lipi ni rahisi zaidi?
strings.h.carpet_roll: Onyesha ni miguu ngapi ya mstari wa roll unahitaji kufunika chumba
strings.h.carpet_yd: Badilisha sq ft kuwa sq yd, kisha zidisha kwa bei
strings.h.carpet_cmp: Hesabu jumla ya gharama ya kila chaguo, kisha ulinganishe. Usikisie kutoka kwa bei ya kitengo pekee.
strings.q.pizza_cmp: Jadala la pizza: ni lipi lina eneo kubwa zaidi—pizza mbili za {small}-inchi au pizza moja ya {large}-inchi? {pi_note}
strings.q.pizza_double: Je! ni nini hufanyika kwa eneo la wadi-pizza unapoongeza radius mara mbili? (Na ilikuja kwa pizza ...)
strings.h.pizza_cmp: Eneo = πr². Kipenyo maradufu (au kipenyo) huzidisha eneo kwa 4.
strings.h.pizza_double: A = πr², kwa hivyo ikiwa r → 2r kisha A → π(2r)² = 4πr²
strings.q.ball_double: Siku ya Shughuli ya Msingi ina mpira unaoshikilia inchi za ujazo za {base} za hewa. Ikiwa kwa njia fulani watapata mpira wenye kipenyo mara mbili (kama mpira wa vikapu uliokula viazi vya mazishi kupita kiasi), ungeshika hewa kiasi gani?
strings.q.ball_half: Vijana walileta mpira ambao unashikilia {base} inchi za ujazo za hewa. Mpira mdogo ulio na nusu ya eneo kwa njia fulani utaonyeshwa kwenye mpira wa vikapu wa kumbi za kitamaduni Jumamosi (tafadhali usimwambie askofu ni madirisha mangapi ambayo karibu yapige). Mpira mdogo ungeshika hewa kiasi gani?
strings.h.ball_double: Kiasi cha mizani ya duara yenye r³, kwa hivyo 2³ = mara 8 ya ujazo.
strings.h.ball_half: Mizani ya ujazo yenye r³, kwa hivyo (1/2)³ = 1/8 ya ujazo.
strings.q.mean: Alama za mazoezi ya Umahiri wa Maandiko ya Seminari kwa wiki: {ds}. Tafuta maana. Zungusha hadi mia iliyo karibu ikiwa inahitajika. (Hapana, Ndugu Jensen, “GPA ya kiroho” si kitu halisi.)
strings.q.median: Hesabu za mahudhurio ya shughuli za Wasichana: {ds}. Tafuta wastani (thamani ya "katikati" baada ya kupanga-kama kutafuta kiti cha kati kwenye kiti).
strings.q.mode: Chaguo msingi za nyimbo za wakati wa kuimba (zilizosimbwa kama nambari): {ds}. Tafuta modi—wimbo ulioombwa zaidi. (Dokezo: pengine ilikuwa “Mimi ni Mtoto wa Mungu.”)
strings.q.range: Hesabu za vitafunio vya safari kwa kila familia: {ds}. Tafuta masafa (max - min). Somo la upainia: kupita kiasi hutokea.
strings.h.mean: Wastani = jumla ya thamani ÷ idadi ya thamani. Ongeza kwanza, kisha ugawanye.
strings.h.median: Panga data; wastani ni thamani ya kati (au wastani wa thamani mbili za kati)
strings.q.best_outliers: Je, ni kipimo kipi cha kituo ambacho huwa bora zaidi wakati data ina vifaa vya ziada (kama vile kata moja iliyoleta sufuria 47 za viazi vya mazishi)?
strings.q.best_cat: Je, ni kipimo kipi cha kituo ambacho ni bora zaidi kwa nyimbo unazopenda / data ya aina ya rangi (kitengo)?
strings.q.best_sym: Ni kipimo gani cha kituo kinatumia kila thamani ya nambari na inalingana na takriban data linganifu (kama vile kuhudhuria kwa pamoja)?
strings.h.best_outliers: Wastani ni sugu kwa wauzaji wa nje; maana inavutwa na uliokithiri.
strings.h.best_cat: Modi ni aina ya mara kwa mara.
strings.h.best_sym: Wastani ni sehemu ya kusawazisha ya maadili yote.
strings.q.range_rule: Tumia kanuni ya masafa kukadiria mkengeuko wa kawaida wa {ds}. Mzunguko hadi karibu mia.
strings.h.range_rule: Kanuni ya safu gumba: s ≈ masafa / 4.
strings.q.compare_sd: {which}: {ds}. Kadiria mkengeuko wa kawaida ukitumia sheria ya range.
strings.q.compare_which:
Seti ya Data #1: {d1}
Data Set #2: {d2}Unatumia kanuni ya masafa ya gumba, ambayo ina tofauti zaidi?
strings.h.compare_which: Kadirio kubwa la SD (fungu/4) linamaanisha utofauti zaidi
strings.q.sd_tf: Kweli au Si Kweli: Pointi za data lazima ziwe mikengeuko 1, 2, au 3 haswa juu au chini ya wastani.
strings.h.sd_tf: Alama za Z zinaweza kuwa nambari yoyote halisi - data inaweza kukaa mahali popote kulingana na wastani.
strings.q.zscore: Mtihani una wastani {mean} na mkengeuko wa kawaida {sd}. Z-score ya alama {score} ni nini? Kadiria kwa mia ya karibu.
strings.h.zscore: z = (x − maana) / mkengeuko wa kawaida. Ingiza kwa uangalifu na mabano.
strings.q.pct_from_z: Kwa kutumia jedwali la kawaida (Z), kuhusu asilimia ngapi ni sehemu ya data ambayo ni mikengeuko ya kawaida ya {z} kutoka kwa wastani? Weka asilimia kama nambari (k.m. 84 kwa asilimia 84). Zungusha hadi nambari nzima iliyo karibu zaidi.
strings.h.pct_from_z: Jedwali linatoa eneo la jumla upande wa kushoto wa z; zidisha kwa 100 kwa asilimia.
strings.q.z_from_pct: Kadiria alama z kwa alama ya data kwenye asilimia {pct}th (kawaida kawaida). Zungusha hadi sehemu ya kumi iliyo karibu zaidi ikiwa inahitajika.
strings.q.skew: Usambazaji wa data umepindishwa kulia (mkia kwenda kulia), kama mkutano nadra wa "mrefu sana" ambao unavuta wastani juu. Ambayo ni ya kweli kwa kawaida?
strings.c.skew_d: Hali daima ni sawa na masafa
strings.h.skew: Mshipa wa kulia huvuta wastani kuelekea mkia mrefu wa kulia.
strings.q.emp_1sd: Umri wa watu wazima katika saraka ya hisa (ya dhahania sana) ni takriban ya kawaida kwa wastani wa miaka {mean} na SD miaka {sd}. Ni takriban asilimia ngapi kati ya {lo} na {hi}? (Usiseme "wote waliacha chungu mapema.")
strings.q.emp_2sd: Miaka ya uanachama ina takriban ugawaji wa kawaida kwa wastani {mean} na SD {sd}. Asilimia gani iko kati ya {lo} na {hi}?
strings.q.emp_3sd: Enzi za washiriki wa darasa la Mafundisho ya Injili ni takriban kawaida kwa wastani wa miaka {mean} na SD miaka {sd}. Ni takriban asilimia ngapi wana umri wa zaidi ya {cut} (klabu adimu ya "Nimesoma tanbihi katika Isaya")?
strings.q.emp_below: Umri wa wamishenari una ugawaji wa kawaida kwa wastani {mean} na SD {sd}. Asilimia gani ni chini ya {cut}?
strings.h.emp_1sd: Kanuni ya kisayansi: ≈68% ndani ya SD 1 ya wastani
strings.h.emp_2sd: Kanuni ya kisayansi: ≈95% ndani ya 2 SD ya wastani
strings.h.emp_3sd: ≈99.7% ndani ya 3 SD, kwa hivyo takriban 0.3% nje ya jumla → ~0.15% katika kila mkia
strings.h.emp_below: Chini ya SD 1 kushoto ya wastani ≈ nusu ya 32% nje ya kati 68% → ~16%
strings.q.literacy: “Tafuta kujifunza, hata kwa kusoma na pia kwa imani” ( M&M 88:118 )—ni mazoezi gani hukusaidia vyema kutumia takwimu kwa kufanya maamuzi mazuri?
strings.c.lit_a: Angalia chanzo, sampuli, na ikiwa grafu/muhtasari unaweza kupotosha
strings.c.lit_b: Daima tumaini grafu ikiwa inaonekana ya kitaalamu
strings.c.lit_c: Tumia wastani pekee na upuuze data iliyobaki
strings.c.lit_d: Fikiria uunganisho kila wakati inamaanisha sababu
strings.h.literacy: Maswali mazuri: Nani alihojiwa? Sampuli ilikuwa kubwa kiasi gani? Ni nini kinacholinganishwa? Je, shoka zimekatwa?
strings.load_confirm: Replace current progress with this JSON file?
strings.progress_load_fail: Could not load that progress file. Use a MAT107 progress JSON export.
strings.q.form_tri_p: Je, ni fomula gani ya mzunguko wa pembetatu yenye pande a, b, na c?
strings.q.skew_right: Histogram hukusanya maadili mengi upande wa kushoto na mkia mrefu unaonyoosha kwenda kulia. Je, unaweza kuelezea vipi usambazaji?
strings.q.skew_left: Histogram hukusanya maadili mengi upande wa kulia na mkia mrefu unaonyoosha kuelekea kushoto. Je, unaweza kuelezea vipi usambazaji?
strings.q.skew_uniform: Ukiangalia chati ya upau wa mtindo wa ripoti ya hali ya hewa ambapo thamani za kila siku hukaa katika bendi nyembamba isiyo na mkia mrefu, unaweza kuielezeaje?
strings.q.skew_effect_follow: Je, hii ina maana gani, wastani, na hali?
strings.h.skew_right_effect: Data iliyopindishwa kulia kawaida huvuta maana upande wa kulia wa wastani (maana > wastani > modi, takribani).
strings.h.skew_left_effect: Data iliyopindishwa kushoto kawaida huvuta wastani wa kushoto wa wastani (maana < wastani).
strings.h.skew_uniform_effect: Wastani, wastani, na hali huwa na uhusiano wa karibu.
strings.h.skew_shape: Skew inaitwa kwa mwelekeo wa mkia mrefu.
strings.c.skew_wrong_a: Wastani, wastani na hali ni sawa kila wakati bila kujali umbo
strings.c.skew_wrong_b: Hali daima ni sawa na masafa
strings.c.skew_wrong_c: Mshikakino huathiri tu mkengeuko wa kawaida, kamwe usiweke hatua za katikati
strings.flash.target_form: Target form: {left} = …  (fill the right-hand side from memory)
strings.mode_finalboss_ready: Face the Gadianton Robber · save Zarahemla
strings.mode_finalboss_cleared: Zarahemla is safe ✓ · ready for the assessment
strings.boss_start: A Gadianton Robber threatens Zarahemla. Answer one unaided question from each topic — no hints. A miss knocks 1 mastery off that topic; clear a remixed version of the same question to keep fighting.
strings.boss_ok: The robber staggers · {current}/{total}. Press on for Zarahemla.
strings.boss_fail: Zarahemla is in danger. The Gadianton Robber slips away on {topic} — that topic drops to {progress}. Rebuild it to 10/10, then face him again.
strings.boss_win: The Gadianton Robber is defeated — Zarahemla is saved. You’re ready for the assessment.
strings.boss_win_again: Zarahemla stands again. Still looking assessment-ready.
strings.boss_invite_mastered: Every topic is mastered at 10/10. A Gadianton Robber threatens Zarahemla — fight him now?
strings.boss_start_practice: Practice boss fight: one unaided question from each topic — no hints. A miss knocks 1 mastery off that topic; clear a remixed version to continue. Master every topic at 10/10 for the true defense of Zarahemla.
strings.boss_fail_practice: Practice run abandoned on {topic}. No full lock-out — master all topics at 10/10 when you’re ready for the real fight.
strings.boss_win_practice: Practice victory! Master every topic at 10/10, then face him again to truly save Zarahemla and earn assessment-ready status.
strings.boss_retreat_msg: You abandoned the fight on {topic}. Practice only that skill until you remaster it (10/10), then face the Gadianton Robber again — a remixed version of the missed question is next.
strings.boss_retreat_msg_real: You abandoned the fight on {topic} — that topic drops to {progress}. Practice only that skill until you remaster it (10/10), then face him again — a remixed version of the missed question is next.
strings.h.nephite_money: Use Alma 11 rates: 1 senine = 1 senum = 1 measure of grain. A seon/amnor is 2 senines, a shum/ezrom is 4, a limnah/onti is 7. A shiblon is ½ senum, shiblum ¼, leah ⅛, antion 1½. In this quiz, 1 senine = $8 for the dollar equivalent.
strings.q.nephite_coin_usd: Using Alma 11, how many dollars is one {coin} worth if 1 senine = ${rate}?
strings.q.nephite_coin_usd.boss: Zarahemla’s treasury quotes prices in Nephite coin. How many dollars is one {coin} worth if 1 senine = ${rate}?
strings.q.nephite_usd_senine: Convert {usd} dollars into senines of gold if 1 senine = ${rate}.
strings.q.nephite_usd_senine.boss: Captain Moroni’s quartermasters need {usd} dollars of supplies. How many senines is that if 1 senine = ${rate}?
strings.q.nephite_judge_wage: A Nephite judge earns 1 senine of gold per day (Alma 11:3). At ${rate} per senine, how many dollars does the judge earn in {days} days?
strings.q.nephite_judge_wage.boss: A Zarahemla judge is bribed with 1 senine per day (Alma 11:3)—the Gadianton rate. At ${rate} per senine, how many dollars is {days} days of that wage?
strings.q.nephite_limnah_usd: One limnah of gold equals 7 senines (Alma 11). If 1 senine = ${rate}, how many dollars is 1 limnah worth?
strings.q.nephite_limnah_usd.boss: A Gadianton bribe of 1 limnah of gold is offered in Zarahemla. If 1 senine = ${rate}, how many dollars is that limnah worth?
strings.q.nephite_coin_equal: In Alma 11, how many {small} equal one {big}?
strings.q.nephite_coin_equal.boss: Nephite clerks under siege must convert coins quickly: how many {small} equal one {big}?
strings.q.carpet_roll.boss: Rebuilders cover a {L} ft × {W} ft council chamber in Zarahemla after Gadianton arson. Flooring comes in a roll {rollW} ft wide at {costLabel} per linear foot (installed). How much does this choice cost in dollars? Round to the nearest cent.
strings.q.carpet_yd.boss: A {L} ft × {W} ft hall in Bountiful needs new flooring after the raid. It costs {costLabel} per square yard (installed). How much does this choice cost in dollars? Round to the nearest cent. (9 sq ft = 1 sq yd)
strings.q.carpet_cmp.boss: Zarahemla’s builders compare flooring for a {L}'×{W}' room. Option A: {rollW}'-wide roll at {costLinLabel}/linear ft. Option B: {costYdLabel}/sq yd. Which is cheaper? (Use the dollar equivalents.)
strings.boss_miss_msg: Missed {topic} — mastery drops to {progress} (one point). Stay in the fight: clear a remixed version of this question to proceed.
strings.boss_drill_blocked: Remaster {topic} to 10/10 before facing the Gadianton Robber again. Keep practicing that topic.
